vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing

parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

verify.value: Spar sockets and anti-rotation key are visible.
verify.rule: [datum_visibility] good: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled. | bad: Interfaces exist only as abstract neighbor references.
[clearance_named] good: Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances. | bad: Moving/removable joints have no clearance or fit language.
[interface_count] good: Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums. | bad: Subsystem is isolated and does not show assembly neighbors.

[standard_fit_vocabulary] good: Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance. | bad: All mating diameters are modeled line-to-line with identical nominal dimensions and no fit class or allowance.

[standard_hardware_dimensioning] good: Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes (M3/M4 clearance holes, standard bearing OD, common pin diameters). | bad: Hardware features use arbitrary dimensions that match no purchasable fastener, bearing, or pin.

verify.value: Spar sockets and key are accessible.
verify.rule: [spar_datum_access] good: Spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable. | bad: Wing/fuselage integration hides spar alignment evidence.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

risk.mit: Add doubler plates and stress analysis.
